about_bio: I'm Andy (@M4ss1ck), a full-stack developer based in Concepción, Chile. I mostly work with React and TypeScript on the web, using Tauri when a project needs to run on the desktop. I like software that works offline and respects user privacy.
extended_bio: I studied Mathematics at university, and it still shapes how I work. I'd rather understand why a system behaves the way it does before I start typing. I'm comfortable owning a product from spec to deployment, and I'm always up for a conversation about building something interesting.
